ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_uri" TEXT /* Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of album (e.g., album, single, compilation) */,
  "album_img" TEXT /* Image URL for the album cover art */,
  "album_url" TEXT /* URL for the album on the music streaming platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "release_date_precision" TEXT /* Precision of the release date (e.g., day, month, year) */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "available_markets" TEXT /* Markets where the album is available */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score for the album */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record label associated with the album */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the album */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "copyright_text" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  "upc_code" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the album */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number assigned by the record label */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a single */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a compilation */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a live recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_img" TEXT /* Image URL for the artist */,
  "artist_url" TEXT /* URL for the artist on the music streaming platform */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary genre associated with the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the artist */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of origin for the artist */,
  "formed_date" TEXT /* Date the artist or band was formed */,
  "disbanded_date" TEXT /* Date the artist or band disbanded (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "track_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score for the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "isrc_code" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_albums" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has played the album */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Last time the user played the album */,
  "favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a favorite of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_url" TEXT /* URL for the label on the music streaming platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "producer_url" TEXT /* URL for the producer on the music streaming platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)
